title: Good Food in partnership with TOWER 5 Piece Knife Set, 1x 8 inch Chef’s Knife, 1x 8 inch Carving Knife,1x 8 inch Bread Knife,1x 5 inch Utility Knife,1x 3.5 inch Paring Knife, Black and Stainless Steel
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: GOOD FOOD TRIED AND TESTED: Expertly prepare meals for the family using this stylish knife block, with five high-quality stainless-steel knives that will let you tackle any kitchen task with ease; All products from Good Food in partnership with Tower have been Tried and Tested by our expert Recipe Development Team to ensure they work optimal with our vast online library of over 15,000 recipes

STYLISH KNIFE BLOCK: Elevate your kitchen with this stylish knife block; A sleek black powder coating finish ensures that it complements both modern and traditional décor, whilst the stainless steel accents draw the eye and add a professional feel

HIGH GRADE STAINLESS STEEL KNIVES: Each knife has been expertly crafted from high quality stainless steel so you can easily slice through tough root vegetables, cuts of meat or de-bone fish; The high quality stainless steel makes food preparation effortless, so you can create delicious meals for the whole family in no time

FINE EDGE SHARP BLADES: Fine edge sharp blades offer effortless food preparation and provide precision when chopping, allowing you to perform more intricate cutting tasks like removing meat from the bone or finely dicing vegetables for a casserole
5 YEAR GUARANTEE: Professional quality with a 1 year guarantee and optional 4 year extension subject to product registration online
description: From the manufacturer Previous page Next page 1 Stylish Knife Block 2 Stainless Steel Blades 3 Fine Edge Sharpness 4 Modern Design 5 Ergonomic Handles
